name: Martinez Bus Svc Inc
employees_est: ~5-10 (D&B lists 31; likely overstated for single-route route)
recent_news: Listed on NM PED School Bus Contractor List (2020) as Questa-area route contractor; no recent M&A or news found.
fit_notes: Very small single-route family contractor in remote northern NM (Cerro/Questa). Too small to be a standalone tuck-in; might only be relevant as part of a regional NM roll-up. Low priority.

name: Suazo Bus Svc Inc
districts_or_customers: Espanola Public Schools (Abiquiu Elementary, Carlos Vigil MS, Espanola Valley HS) - routes 10 & 59 serving Abiquiu/Barranco/Pueblo de Abiquiu
recent_news: Incorporated NM 1995; remains a small owner-operated route contractor for Espanola Public Schools. Note: Joe Suazo obituary (June 2020) found - possible family succession event.
fit_notes: Sub-scale family owner-operator running 1-2 buses for Espanola PS. ~30 yrs in operation with possible succession event (Joe Suazo, 2020). Too small to be a standalone tuck-in; only relevant as part of a NM regional roll-up.

name: Bristol School Trnsprtn Co Inc
fleet_size_est: unknown (D&B lists 31 employees, suggesting ~15-25 buses if accurate)
districts_or_customers: likely Bristol-Warren Regional School District and/or RI private/parochial schools in Region 3/6
recent_news: No web presence or news found. RI statewide K-12 transport is dominated by First Student, DATTCO, and Ocean State Transit; Bristol School Transportation does not surface in BWRSD or RIDE materials. Status uncertain - may be dormant or operating as a small private/parochial contractor.
fit_notes: Possible small RI contractor but no confirmable web/press footprint. RI K-12 market is consolidated under First Student/DATTCO/Ocean State Transit. Needs phone/in-person verification (572 Main St, Warren). Low priority pending confirmation it is an active operator.

name: East Lansing Bus Depot Inc
fleet_size_est: none confirmed as school bus operator
districts_or_customers: East Lansing Public Schools transportation is provided by Dean Transportation - NOT by 'East Lansing Bus Depot Inc'
recent_news: Address 308 W Grand River is in the downtown/MSU retail strip and historical references suggest non-transit retail occupancy. East Lansing Public Schools confirms Dean Transportation as its school bus provider. No school-bus contractor by this name surfaces in any MI transportation directory.
fit_notes: Almost certainly NOT an independent school-bus operator. Likely a defunct entity, retail/coach charter business, or D&B mis-tag. Drop from target universe pending direct confirmation.

name: TBS Technical Bus Solution
fleet_size_est: unknown - likely service/repair shop, not a route contractor
districts_or_customers: No school district contract identified. Redmond School District uses district-owned/operated transportation.
recent_news: No web/press footprint as a school bus operator. Suite at 944 SW Veterans Way #105 is in a retail plaza (T-Mobile occupies the main address). Name 'Technical Bus Solution' suggests a bus repair/technical services business rather than a student-transport contractor.
fit_notes: Likely a bus repair/technical service vendor, not an independent school-bus operating contractor. Does not fit Summit's tuck-in profile. Drop from target universe.
